heading: Resources & Quick Links
subtitle: Essential websites, tools, and points of contact for small businesses navigating federal contracting.

links.name: SAM.gov
links.desc: System for Award Management — required for all federal contractors

links.name: DSBS
links.desc: Dynamic Small Business Search — market your capabilities

links.name: 13 C.F.R. Parts 121–134
links.desc: SBA regulations on eCFR — size standards, programs, OHA rules

links.name: SBA Procurement Scorecard
links.desc: Annual agency performance against small business goals

links.name: FAR Overhaul Resources
links.desc: Deviation guides and practitioner albums from the FAR Council

links.name: SAM.gov Contract Opportunities
links.desc: Search active federal solicitations and awards

links.name: USASpending.gov
links.desc: Track federal spending and award data by agency, program, and contractor

links.name: FPDS (Federal Procurement Data System)
links.desc: Detailed procurement data for market research

links.name: GovWin IQ
links.desc: Commercial market intelligence on federal contracting (subscription)

links.name: PTAC Locator
links.desc: Find your nearest Procurement Technical Assistance Center

links.name: SBDC Locator
links.desc: Find your nearest Small Business Development Center

links.name: SBA Learning Platform
links.desc: Free online courses on government contracting basics

links.name: SBA Office of the National Ombudsman
links.desc: Helps small businesses resolve issues with federal regulations and enforcement
